Kneeling at a navigation console with one hand adjusting a star-chart dial, helmet resting on the floor beside them.
Crouched low behind a crystalline outcrop with a scanning device extended, reading energy signatures from a nearby artifact.
Seated in a captain's chair with legs crossed, reviewing a holographic tactical display hovering at eye level.
Lying prone across a transparent observation dome, arms folded beneath chin, gazing down at a nebula swirling below.
Leaning far forward over a ritual altar with both palms pressed flat, examining intricate carved symbols in ancient stone.
Mid-stride walking through a derelict ship corridor with one hand trailing along the wall, flashlight cutting through darkness ahead.
Reaching up to a ceiling panel with a multi-tool extended, sparks cascading down as they bypass a security lock.
Floating in zero-gravity with arms tucked and body rotating slowly, tethered cable drifting through the open airlock behind.
Bent over a specimen container with a probe in hand, cataloging an alien biological sample glowing faintly green.
Crawling through a narrow maintenance shaft on elbows and knees, dragging a tool-pack behind with one hand.
Reclining in a cryo-pod with eyes half-closed, frost forming on the faceplate, one hand resting on the chest monitor.
Squatting beside a fallen comrade with one hand checking a pulse-scanner, the other steadying against the dust-covered ground.
Seated cross-legged on a cargo crate, field-stripping a plasma rifle with components laid out methodically across their lap.
Climbing halfway up a ship's exterior ladder with one arm hooked through a rung, welding-torch flaring at a hull seam.
Twisted sharply at the waist looking back over their shoulder, one hand reaching for a holstered sidearm at sudden movement.
Lying on their back beneath a console panel with arms raised overhead, rewiring conduits as sparks rain onto their visor.
Hauling a heavy salvage crate up a ramp with both hands gripping the edge, shoulders hunched forward, boots scraping metal.
Kneeling at an archaeological dig-site brushing dust from an ancient relic, survey-scanner blinking softly on their wrist-mount.
Leaning back against a bulkhead with arms crossed, observing a tense negotiation through a viewport into the adjacent chamber.
Diving forward into a plasma-shield barrier with arms outstretched, debris exploding against the flickering energy field behind them.
Crouched over an open floor panel with both hands deep in exposed circuitry, rerouting power to emergency life-support systems.
Seated at a navigator's station with one hand on a thruster-control yoke, reading atmospheric-entry vectors on three stacked screens.
Lying prone on a sniper's perch with rifle braced on a tripod, scope trained on a distant landing-platform's access gate.
Reaching forward with both arms extended to catch a drifting data-core module, fingertips just grazing its reflective surface.
Kneeling beside a bioluminescent pool with one gloved hand submerged, collecting samples in a pressurized vial at their belt.
Bent double over a holo-projection table studying contested territory maps, stylus hovering above a blinking contested zone marker.
Floating mid-drift through a cargo bay with legs tucked, pushing off a bulkhead with one boot toward an open access hatch.
Climbing partway up a crystal-lattice tower with one hand gripping a carved handrail, headlamp illuminating the spiral path above.
Reclining propped on one elbow across a meditation cushion, tracing luminous orbital-paths with a fingertip through holographic star-dust.
Mid-stride sprinting across a ship's observation deck with arms pumping, racing toward a closing emergency-bulkhead doorway ahead.
Crouched beside a shattered viewport with rifle barrel resting on the frame, targeting-reticle scanning the debris field drifting outside.
Seated on a stone ledge with legs dangling over a chasm, sketching alien constellation patterns into a weathered journal.
Lying face-down across wreckage with one arm stretched toward a flickering emergency beacon half-buried in twisted metal plating.
Leaning sideways against a console tower with head tilted back, listening intently to a crackling distress-transmission through helmet speakers.
Reaching down into an excavated pit with both arms extended, carefully lifting a sealed containment-cylinder from layered sediment.
Kneeling at a plasma-forge altar with head bowed low, welding-tool tracing ritual-patterns into a ceremonial blade's surface.
Crawling on hands and knees through low-ceilinged ruins, pushing a survey-drone ahead while ancient dust cascades from overhead.
Reclining in a navigator's acceleration-couch with legs elevated, watching ringed-planets scroll past through the panoramic overhead canopy.
Bent forward at the waist over a gravity-well map, both hands adjusting orbital-trajectory markers around a pulsing neutron-star.
Floating inverted in microgravity with arms spread wide, tether-line spiraling loosely as binary-stars illuminate the viewing-port beyond.
Kneeling beside a damaged drone with both hands extracting its flight-recorder, diagnostic-cables snaking across the metal deck.
Crouched in a weapons-locker alcove cleaning a scoped carbine, ammunition cartridges arranged in neat rows beside one knee.
Seated at a communications array with headset on, fingers flying across transmission-keys to decrypt an intercepted alien broadcast.
Lying supine on a scanner-bed with arms at sides, biometric-sensors mapping skeletal structure in hovering blue-light grids above.
Leaning far over a ship's external railing with torso extended, magnetic-grapple in hand retrieving a tumbling supply-pod from space.
Mid-stride descending a spiral staircase carved from meteor-stone, one hand steadying against the glowing wall-veins for balance.
Reaching both arms into an overhead conduit-junction, splicing fiber-optic cables together while balancing on a maintenance ladder.
Floating horizontally past a massive porthole with face pressed close, watching a planet's terminator-line sweep across continents below.
Bent over a workbench with magnification-visor down, soldering microscopic components onto a recovered alien navigation-chip.
Crawling across a hull-breach on magnetized gloves and knees, dragging a sealant-sprayer toward the venting atmosphere ahead.
